title: phreatia trilobulata
intro: Phreatia trilobulata is a species of orchid, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical forests of Papua New Guinea and nearby islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with roots and tubers containing compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phreatia trilobulata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, among others. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by boiling the roots or tubers in water to harness its medicinal properties.
